positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical mandala illustration. The design features interwoven stylized elements: glowing nebula clusters, intricate bioluminescent flowers, abstract geometric constellations, and ethereal crystalline vines. The composition is centralized and perfectly balanced, using deep midnight blues, royal purples, antique gold, and vibrant cyan accents. The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and deep space retro-futurism, rendered with sharp vector-like precision, clean silhouettes, and extreme contrast. The lighting should come from internal glow sources within the flowers and stars, creating a magical, illuminated effect perfect for screen printing on apparel. Intricate line work, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, jpeg artifacts, grayscale, dull colors
